name: Travis Phelps
description:
ʜᴇ ɴᴇᴠᴇʀ ᴡᴀɴᴛᴇᴅ ʏᴏᴜ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴇᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛ ꜱɪɴꜰᴜʟ ᴛʜᴏᴜɢʜᴛꜱ ᴡᴇʀᴇ ʜᴇʟᴅ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴏꜱᴇ ᴘᴀɢᴇꜱ.

"ᴍᴏᴍᴍʏ ᴅɪᴅ ɪᴛ, ᴅᴀᴅᴅʏ ᴅɪᴅ ɪᴛ
ᴇᴠᴇɴ ᴛʜᴏᴜɢʜ ɪ ʙᴇᴛ ᴛʜᴇʏ ᴡɪꜱʜ ᴛʜᴇʏ ʀᴇᴀʟʟʏ ᴅɪᴅɴ'ᴛ
ᴍᴀʀʏ ᴅɪᴅ ɪᴛ, ᴊᴏᴇʏ ᴅɪᴅ ɪᴛ
ᴇᴠᴇɴ ʟɪᴛᴛʟᴇ ʙᴀʙʏ, ʙᴀʙʏ ᴊᴇꜱᴜꜱ ᴅɪᴅ ɪᴛ
ʏᴜᴘᴘɪᴇꜱ ᴅᴏ ɪᴛ, ᴊᴜɴᴋɪᴇꜱ ᴅᴏ ɪᴛ
ᴛʜᴇ ꜰᴜɴɴʏ ʟɪᴛᴛʟᴇ ᴍᴏɴᴋᴇʏꜱ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴢᴏᴏ ᴡɪʟʟ ᴅᴏ ɪᴛ
ᴛʜᴇ ꜱᴛᴜᴘɪᴅ ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɪᴛ, ᴛʜᴇ ꜰᴏᴏʟɪꜱʜ ᴅᴏ ɪᴛ
ᴏɴʟʏ ᴛʜᴇ ᴜɴʟᴜᴄᴋʏ ᴏꜰ ᴜꜱ ɢᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴏ ɪᴛ"

I've been having some serious trouble with bots lately no matter how much I test them, and I've had this trouble using other's bots too, so I assume it's an issue with Janitor.ai and not what I'm doing.

If the bot writes for you, delete it. If it strays from the prompt try again or edit the message. I apologize, I wish I could do something about it.

IMPORTANT ABOUT THE BOT: Travis in this bot (and others I will make of him) has self-harm scars both fresh and old under his sleeves, I just am choosing to not include it in the initial message. Travis in this bot also has welts on his back from his father's belt, along with bruises littering his ribs. Just thought I would let you guys know the vision I had for him and how I wrote him to look like (in that way, anyway,) for context.

This also takes place in their senior year, and Travis is 19 years old
creator: boris
